title: Flavorful Tender Indian Kielbasa Thali
description: A sweet and tender Indian dish featuring kielbasa, served in a thali format, perfect for a filling lunch. This egg-free friendly recipe is made with a rich deglaze-fond and served in a ramekin.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced kielbasa and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the kielbasa from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion, bell pepper, and tomato to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garam masala, cumin, and coriander to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked kielbasa back to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Deglaze the skillet with a little water to create a fond, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Spoon the kielbasa mixture into a ramekin and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh cilantro, if desired.
